heading: Positions classified by statute
label: 5109 Positions classified by statute

References in Text, referred to in subsec. (a), probably means section 2 of , which was formerly classified to , Agriculture, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as .Section 450d of title 7act Apr. 4, 1940, ch. 75section 450d of Title 7section 2204–2 of Title 7

children.label: a
children.text: The position held by an employee of the Department of Agriculture while he, under , is designated and vested with a delegated regulatory function or part thereof shall be classified in accordance with this chapter, but not lower than GS–14.section 450d of title 71See References in Text note below.1
The position held by a fully experienced and qualified railroad safety inspector of the Department of Transportation shall be classified in accordance with this chapter, but not lower than GS–12.
The position held by a railroad safety specialist of the Department shall be classified in accordance with this chapter, but not lower than GS–13.
